channel.title: DDA on Lithos' Blog
channel.description: Recent content in DDA on Lithos' Blog

item.title: 🎨 DDA3003 Midterm revision
item.description: CUHKSZ 选修课程 DDA3003 Visualization。期中复习 InfoVis, Tufte’s Design Principles, Gestalt Laws of encoding data, Visual perception, Color scheme, D3, HTML, CSS as well as Multivariate data cleaning, common tables and plots.

item.title: 🎨 DDA3003 Introduction to D3
item.description: CUHKSZ 选修课程 DDA3003 Visualization，介绍 D3.js ——— 一种 HTML 可视化工具
